subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-05 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: Rest assured in the protection of God. He will preserve his own children under all circumstances.
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @poems and quotation from poetry, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
